Generate a Standalone Shiny App Script

Source: R/paintr-export.R
generate_shiny.Rd

Generate a single-file Shiny app that uses the same ggpaintr runtime helpers as the package.

Usage

generate_shiny(
  paintr_obj,
  var_ui,
  output_file,
  style = TRUE,
  copy_rules = NULL
)

Arguments

paintr_obj

A paintr_obj.

var_ui

Deprecated legacy argument retained for backward compatibility. It is ignored.

output_file

Path to the generated .R script.

style

Whether to style the generated file with styler when available.

copy_rules

Optional named list of copy overrides for UI labels, helper text, and placeholders.

Value

Invisibly returns output_file.

Examples

obj <- paintr_formula(
  "ggplot(data = mtcars, aes(x = var, y = var)) + geom_point()"
)
out_file <- tempfile(fileext = ".R")
generate_shiny(obj, list(), out_file, style = FALSE)
file.exists(out_file)
#> [1] TRUE

On this page
